title: Hide subitems ehwn sharing a board (shareable link)

posts.author: biancanico (Bianca Nico)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently when we generate a shareable link from a board, it is possible to hide information from the item but all subitems information is available. It is pretty unintuitive that the product would work this way.

My request is to have people from outside my account to get a shareable link and see only the items and subitems that are not hidden, having the same view that was set on my board view. Most times I have sensible information on subitems that I can’t share, and currently it is not possible to share a board with a link without experiencing this issue.
